title: Squirrel Removal in Van Nest, Bronx | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Van Nest, Bronx. Safe, humane extraction and exclusion. Licensed experts serving Van Nest homes and businesses. Call today!
intro: Van Nest residents know that squirrels can be charming in the park but destructive when they invade attics, walls, and soffits of local homes. Our professional squirrel removal services protect Van Nest properties from chewing damage, noise, and health hazards caused by squirrel infestations. Best Pest Control NYC provides safe, humane squirrel extraction and permanent exclusion solutions tailored to Van Nest's unique housing stock.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Van Nest and the greater Bronx for years with certified wildlife removal specialists who understand the specific challenges of this neighborhood's mix of single-family homes and multi-family buildings. We offer comprehensive squirrel removal with warranties, same-day emergency service, and proven exclusion techniques that keep squirrels out for good.
localContext: Van Nest's tree-lined streets and proximity to parks like Bronx Park create ideal conditions for squirrel populations that often seek shelter in the neighborhood's classic brick homes and pre-war buildings. The area's older residential structures with mature trees nearby are particularly vulnerable to squirrel entry through roof vents, chimneys, and deteriorating soffits common in Van Nest architecture.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Van Nest?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Van Nest typically costs between $900 and $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, removal, entry point sealing, and cleanup. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Van Nest properties.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my Van Nest attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in walls or attics especially during dawn and dusk, visible entry holes near the roofline, chewed wood or wires, droppings in the attic, and squirrels seen entering or exiting your roof. Van Nest homeowners often notice increased activity during fall when squirrels seek winter shelter.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane and legal in the Bronx?
faqs.answer: Yes, our squirrel removal methods are completely humane and comply with all New York City and state wildlife regulations. We use live trapping techniques and follow proper relocation protocols. Our licensed technicians ensure ethical treatment of all wildlife while protecting your Van Nest home from further intrusion.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Van Nest home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service for Van Nest residents. Most squirrel removal projects are completed within 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and access points. After removal, we seal all entry points immediately to prevent re-entry and can schedule follow-up inspections to ensure your home remains squirrel-free.
